description: A logistics-master record for a unit of measure. The uom code is the natural key; an item carries a stockUom and a purchaseUom, and a requisition/PO line states a quantity in a UoM. The master spans volume, weight, length, area, quantity (the largest set: can/bottle/pallet/reel/box/carton/nos/pc/set/...), and commercial (lot/job/service) categories. Maintainable individually or by bulk import (natural-key upsert by uom).

fields.name: uom
fields.label: Unit of Measure
fields.validation: non-blank; the short code e.g. kg, ltr, nos, pcs, ctn, set; natural primary key; unique; immutable; the bulk-import upsert key
fields.purpose: The stable short code an item's stockUom/purchaseUom and a line's quantity reference; the natural key bulk import upserts on. Carries the unit a quantity is denominated in end to end.

fields.name: fullForm
fields.label: Full Form
fields.validation: non-blank; the expanded name e.g. Kilogram, Litre, Numbers, Carton
fields.purpose: The expanded label shown in dropdowns and on documents so a user reads 'Kilogram' rather than memorizing 'kg'; the display field for the UoM reference.

fields.name: category
fields.label: Category
fields.validation: one of {Volume, Weight, Length, Area, Quantity, Commercial}; groups the unit by measurement family
fields.purpose: Groups the unit by measurement family so dropdowns filter sensibly and a future conversion only applies within a compatible family (you convert litres to ml, never litres to kg).

fields.name: status
fields.label: Status
fields.validation: INACTIVE not selectable on new items/lines; existing records retain their unit
fields.purpose: Lets an admin retire a unit from new use without altering items or lines already denominated in it.

invariants: A13 audit + SSE on every committed master change
uom is the natural key; the bulk-import upsert key
